heroSubtitle: Comfort-forward options for patients who need extra help relaxing during treatment.

sections.title: What is Solea Sleep?
body: Soleasleep is presented here as a dedicated pathway for patients who want a calmer experience—especially when longer appointments, sensitivity, or anxiety are part of the picture.
Your suitability depends on health history and the procedure planned. We’ll review this together with the same clarity we bring to every treatment conversation.

sections.title: How we approach comfort
body: We start with communication: what you’ve experienced before, what worries you, and what “comfortable” looks like for you.
When appropriate, we discuss options, monitoring, and what to expect before, during, and after your visit—so you’re never guessing.

sections.title: Next steps
body: If you’re interested in Solea Sleep—or you’re not sure what level of support you need—book a consultation. Bring your questions; we’ll map a plan that fits.

faq.a: Not always. Medical history, medications, and the type of procedure matter. We’ll screen carefully and discuss alternatives if needed.

faq.q: Will I need a ride home?
faq.a: For many comfort protocols, yes—plan for an adult escort if sedation or similar options are used. We’ll give you written instructions.

faq.q: Can I combine this with other treatment?
faq.a: Often, yes—especially when bundling care reduces visits. We’ll prioritize safety and pacing.

seo.title: Soleasleep | Amity Gentle Dental
seo.description: Learn about Solea Sleep and comfort-forward care at Amity Gentle Dental.
